feat.name: Dodge Away
feat.requirement: You're aware of the attack and aren't off-guard.
feat.text: You use your acrobatic prowess to evade an attack, using momentum to keep yourself moving if you choose. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses you, you can Step after the Strike. If you're a master in Acrobatics, you can move 10 feet for this Step instead of 5 feet.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: You are the target of a melee attack.
